title: Recurring motif
description: Repeat and transform a concise musical idea across key character and story turns.
solves: A film whose emotional developments do not feel connected.

title: Minimal score
description: Use sparse instrumentation and carefully rationed cues to preserve dramatic space.
solves: A cut whose music tells the audience what to feel too often.

title: Emotional theme
description: Write a lyrical theme that gives the central relationship an immediate emotional voice.
solves: A character drama that needs a stronger emotional bridge to viewers.

title: Rhythmic pulse
description: Drive transitions and escalating sequences with a controlled rhythmic engine.
solves: Sequences that need momentum without further picture cuts.

title: Period music texture
description: Use instrumentation and recording character associated with the story's era.
solves: A period world that lacks cultural and sonic specificity.

title: No-score realism
description: Remove non-diegetic music and let performance, rooms, and practical sources carry emotion.
solves: A realism-driven film undermined by overt emotional instruction.
